mapper.select: SELECT h.history_id AS historyId, r.reservation_id AS reservationId, h.user_id AS userId, h.seat_id AS seatId, h.round_id AS roundId, h.action AS reservedStatus, h.created_at AS createdReserved, s.seat_row AS seatRow, s.seat_colume AS seatColume, s.grade, p.p_title AS pTitle, pr.round_time AS roundTime FROM RESERVATION_HISTORY h LEFT JOIN RESERVATIONS r ON h.seat_id = r.seat_id AND h.round_id = r.round_id JOIN SEATS s ON h.seat_id = s.seat_id JOIN PERFORMANCE_ROUND pr ON h.round_id = pr.round_id JOIN PERFORMANCES p ON pr.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.history_id = ( SELECT MAX(h2.history_id) FROM RESERVATION_HISTORY h2 WHERE h2.seat_id = h.seat_id AND h2.round_id = h.round_id AND h2.user_id = h.user_id ) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT reservation_id AS reservationId, user_id AS userId, seat_id AS seatId, round_id AS roundId, reserved_status AS reservedStatus, created_reserved AS createdReserved FROM RESERVATIONS WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATIONS SET user_id = NULL, reserved_status = 'AVAILABLE', reserved_at = NULL WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
